hooks.name: validate-python-syntax
hooks.description: After editing any Python file, verify it parses correctly
hooks.command: python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('$FILE').read())" 2>&1 || echo 'SYNTAX ERROR in $FILE — fix before continuing'

hooks.name: remind-pipeline-logger
hooks.description: When creating a new scraper file, remind to add pipeline_logger
hooks.command: grep -q 'pipeline_logger' '$FILE' || echo 'WARNING: New scraper is missing pipeline_logger integration. Add log_scrape_start/log_scrape_complete calls.'
